instruction: In System Settings under Privacy & Security > Full Disk Access, turn the Full Disk Access permission for {BUNDLE} {STATE}.
source: cove-original (design 047 §5 Tier-B TCC). Verifies a Full Disk Access grant in TCC.db; the getter checkpoints the WAL so the just-written grant is settled. Baseline grants the opposite value so the no-op run scores 0.

args: DB="$HOME/Library/Application Support/com.apple.TCC/TCC.db"; mkdir -p "$(dirname "$DB")"; sqlite3 "$DB" 'CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS access(service TEXT, client TEXT, auth_value INTEGER, PRIMARY KEY(service,client));'; sqlite3 "$DB" "INSERT OR REPLACE INTO access(service,client,auth_value) VALUES('kTCCServiceSystemPolicyAllFiles','{BUNDLE}',{BASELINE});"
DB="$HOME/Library/Application Support/com.apple.TCC/TCC.db"; sqlite3 "$DB" "UPDATE access SET auth_value={WANT} WHERE service='kTCCServiceSystemPolicyAllFiles' AND client='{BUNDLE}';"

result.query: SELECT auth_value FROM access WHERE service='kTCCServiceSystemPolicyAllFiles' AND client='{BUNDLE}';
